transcript: No, no, no, no. Wham! Make it big as the album that George and Andy earned the exclamation point. So, am I supposed to just smile and wave you out the door? Think of it like spring cleaning. Only if spring was death. God, if I had a nickel for every time I spanked it to Bernadette Peters. Sounds like you. Bernadette is not going anywhere because you're not going anywhere. Drink. You're right. Cancer's only in my liver, lungs, prostate, and brain. All things I can live without. You belong here at home, surrounded by your Voltron and your Bernadette and your me. Listen, we both know that cancer is a shit show. like a yak-off, smear-off, opening for the spin doctors at the Iowa State Fair. Shit show. And under no circumstances will I take you to that show. I want you to remember me. Not the ghost of Christmas me. Well, I want to remember us. I swear to God, I will find you in the next life and I'm going to boombox Careless Whisper outside your window. Wham! No one is boomboxing shit, okay? We can fight this. Besides, I just realized something. You win. Your life is officially way more fucked up than mine.
